name: Horizonte Minerals Plc
description: Horizonte Minerals Plc is a nickel development company focused on Brazil. The company is developing two 100%-owned Tier 1 projects in Pará State, Brazil: the Araguaia Nickel Project, which is under construction and designed to produce high-grade ferronickel, and the Vermelho Nickel-Cobalt Project, which is in the feasibility stage and aimed at producing nickel and cobalt sulphate for the electric vehicle battery market.
